description: Content gate configuration for Phase 1.5 unified content engine. Hard constraints from Dustin's voice guide enforced as infrastructure gates (P2).
forbidden_words: at the end of the day

forbidden_patterns.name: em_dash
forbidden_patterns.description: No em dashes — use commas, periods, or parentheses

forbidden_patterns.name: contrastive_reframe
forbidden_patterns.description: No 'It's not X, it's Y' constructions

g8_factual_accuracy.description: Flags claims requiring human verification before publication
